gwSpecs.description: Power your imagination to create the extraordinary on screen. With an incredibly bright output of over 3000 lux @10ft/3m, Gemini 1x1 Hard delivers the brightest and most accurate 1x1 light ever. Blast through a silk, build layers of diffusion or bounce light off a board, with precision control of hue, saturation, intensity, gels and effects, Gemini 1x1 Hard gives you the power to control and create your own extraordinary.

revision.text: 1.0.01 - Initial Public release, Uploaded to GDTF Share.
